method: scripts/adg-tokens.mjs estimateTokens (deterministic BPE-ish atom count); same method both sides so deltas are measured, not asserted

loop1.note: Same packet, default format only. JSON still available via format:'json'. Measured per MCP context_packet call.

loop1.change: agent:evals compact stdout (summary + failures only; full report kept in data/agent-evals.json)

after.note: 8 scenarios (3 driving the real hook), summary only

loop1.note: Token reduction AND more security coverage in the same change.

loop1.change: context packet prefix-stable (generatedAt moved to a trailing _meta block)

before.note: generatedAt at line 2 (toon) / second key (json) broke the cacheable prefix

after.note: only the trailing line varies between same-feature calls; verified by diff

loop1.cacheEffect: enables prompt-cache reuse of the stable prefix; cache reads cost ~0.1x base input price per Anthropic prompt-caching docs
loop1.note: No per-call token change; unlocks up to ~90% input-cost reduction on repeated same-feature calls.
